title: TWA Bubblewrap Configuration
description: Schema and reference for android/twa-manifest.json generated by Bubblewrap CLI

packageId.description: Reverse-domain package name. IMMUTABLE after first Play Store publication.

host.description: Production domain of the PWA (no scheme, no trailing slash). Must match the domain where assetlinks.json is hosted.

startUrl.description: Path relative to host. Must match PWA start_url.

name.description: Full app name shown on Play Store.

launcherName.description: Short name shown under home screen icon.

display.description: Must match PWA manifest display mode.

themeColor.description: Status bar colour. Must match PWA manifest theme_color.

backgroundColor.description: Splash screen background. Must match PWA manifest background_color.

enableNotifications.description: Whether to request notification permission. Set false for initial release.

targetSdkVersion.description: Target Android API level. Play Store requires targetSdk >= 34 for all new apps.

signingKey.description: Signing key reference. Actual keystore stored as CI secret, not committed.

alias.description: Keystore alias for the signing certificate.

iconUrl.description: URL or path to the maskable 512x512 icon used for Play Store upload.
